# FFERR_INVALIDPARAM | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Force Feedback ](/documentation/forcefeedback)

- [ FFERR_INVALIDPARAM ](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_invalidparam)

-  FFERR_INVALIDPARAM 

Global Variable# FFERR_INVALIDPARAM

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.2+

```
var FFERR_INVALIDPARAM: HRESULT { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/forcefeedback/fferr_invalidparam#Discussion)

An invalid parameter was passed to the returning function, or the object was not in a state that admitted the function to be called.
